<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band06_chunk004.pdf#page=9 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band06 p166 -->

<!-- header: ALTSTADT -->

<!-- header: ALTSTAD -->


[[File:Band06_chunk004_p009_img001.jpg|thumb]]


[[File:Band06_chunk004_p009_img002.jpg|thumb|Huldigung an Wissenschaft und Tugend]]
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band06 p167 -->
